case_title: SAVAGE, DONALD G., RECEIVER vs. WILLIAMS, JEANETTE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, JEANETTE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 HYDE #500, STAYED UNTIL JUL-14-1995, IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE, PLTF ON EX PARTE DECLARATION MAY HAVE AMENDED JDMT FOR MONEY.
